robots.name: Protein Viewer
robots.description: Interactive 3D protein structure viewer. Load PDB files, rotate, zoom, color by chain/residue/secondary structure.

robots.name: DNA Editor
robots.description: Build and edit DNA sequences. Visualize base pairs, transcribe to mRNA, translate to amino acids. Codon table included.

robots.name: CRISPR Simulator
robots.description: Simulate CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing. Design guide RNA, see where it binds, cut the DNA, insert new sequence.

robots.name: Molecular Dynamics
robots.description: Watch atoms bounce around in a Lennard-Jones potential. Adjust temperature, density. See phase transitions.

robots.name: Drug Binding
robots.description: Dock a drug molecule into a protein binding pocket. Rotate, score the fit. Learn about pharmacology.

robots.name: Cell Simulator
robots.description: Interactive cell biology — organelles, membranes, transport. Click parts to learn. Simulate mitosis step by step.

robots.name: Evolution Simulator
robots.description: Population genetics in action. Mutation, selection, drift, gene flow. Watch allele frequencies change over generations.

robots.name: Neural Signaling
robots.description: Hodgkin-Huxley neuron model. See action potentials fire, adjust ion channel conductances, build simple neural circuits.
